name: listAccounts
title: List Accounts
description: List all email accounts and their identities

name: listFolders
title: List Folders
description: List all mail folders with URIs and message counts

accountId.description: Optional account ID (from listAccounts) to limit results to a single account

folderPath.description: Optional folder URI (from listFolders) to list only that folder and its subfolders

name: searchMessages
title: Search Mail
description: Search message headers and return IDs/folder paths you can use with getMessage to read full email content

query.description: Text to search. Multi-word queries are AND-of-tokens: every word must appear somewhere across subject/author/recipients/ccList/preview (or inside the selected field when an operator is used). Prefix with 'from:', 'subject:', 'to:', or 'cc:' to restrict matching to one field (e.g. 'from:Alice Smith' requires both tokens in the author field). Use empty string to match all.

folderPath.description: Optional folder URI (from listFolders) to limit search to that folder and its subfolders

startDate.description: Filter messages on or after this ISO 8601 date

endDate.description: Filter messages on or before this ISO 8601 date. Date-only strings (e.g. '2024-01-15') include the full day.

maxResults.description: Maximum number of results to return (default 50, max 200)

offset.description: Number of results to skip for pagination (default 0). When provided, returns {messages, totalMatches, offset, limit, hasMore} instead of a plain array. Note: totalMatches is capped at 10000.

sortOrder.description: Date sort order: asc (oldest first) or desc (newest first, default)

tag.description: Filter by tag keyword (e.g. '$label1' for Important, or a custom tag). Only messages with this tag are returned.

includeSubfolders.description: If false, only search the specified folder — not its subfolders. Default: true.

countOnly.description: If true, return only the match count instead of full results. Much faster for 'how many unread?' queries.

searchBody.description: If true, search full message bodies using Thunderbird's Gloda index (slower but finds text beyond the ~200 char preview). Requires query. IMAP accounts need offline sync enabled for body indexing.

name: getMessage
title: Get Message
description: Read the full content of an email message by its ID

folderPath.description: The folder URI path (from searchMessages results)

saveAttachments.description: If true, save attachments to <OS temp dir>/thunderbird-agent/<messageId>/ and include filePath in response (default: false)

bodyFormat.description: Body output format: 'markdown' (default, preserves structure), 'text' (plain text), 'html' (raw HTML)

rawSource.description: If true, return the full raw RFC 2822 message source (all headers + MIME parts). Useful for extracting calendar invites, S/MIME data, or debugging. Other fields (body, attachments) are omitted when this is set. Note: requires local/offline message copy; IMAP messages not cached offline may fail.

name: sendMail
title: Compose Mail
description: Compose a new email. By default opens a compose window for review; set skipReview to send directly.

isHtml.description: Set to true if body contains HTML markup (default: false)

from.description: Sender identity (email address or identity ID from listAccounts)

skipReview.description: If true, send the message directly without opening a compose window (default: false)

attachments.description: Attachments: file paths (strings) or inline objects ({name, contentType, base64})

name: listCalendars
title: List Calendars
description: Return the user's calendars

name: createEvent
title: Create Event
description: Create a calendar event. By default opens a review dialog; set skipReview to add directly.

endDate.description: End date/time in ISO 8601 (defaults to startDate + 1h for timed, +1 day for all-day)

calendarId.description: Target calendar ID (from listCalendars, defaults to first writable calendar)

status.description: VEVENT STATUS: 'tentative', 'confirmed', or 'cancelled'. Defaults to confirmed if omitted.

skipReview.description: If true, add the event directly without opening a review dialog (default: false)

name: listEvents
title: List Events
description: List calendar events within a date range

calendarId.description: Calendar ID to query (from listCalendars). If omitted, queries all calendars.

startDate.description: Start of date range in ISO 8601 format (default: now)

endDate.description: End of date range in ISO 8601 format (default: 30 days from startDate)

maxResults.description: Maximum number of events to return (default: 100, max: 500)

name: updateEvent
title: Update Event
description: Update an existing calendar event's title, dates, location, or description

calendarId.description: The calendar ID containing the event (from listEvents results)

startDate.description: New start date/time in ISO 8601 format (optional)

endDate.description: New end date/time in ISO 8601 format (optional)

name: deleteEvent
title: Delete Event
description: Delete a calendar event

calendarId.description: The calendar ID containing the event (from listEvents results)

name: createTask
title: Create Task
description: Open a pre-filled task dialog in Thunderbird for user review before saving

calendarId.description: Target calendar ID (from listCalendars, must have supportsTasks=true)

name: listTasks
title: List Tasks
description: List tasks/to-dos from Thunderbird calendars, optionally filtered by completion status or due date

calendarId.description: Calendar ID to query (from listCalendars). If omitted, queries all task-capable calendars.

completed.description: Filter by completion status. true = completed only, false = outstanding only. Omit for all tasks.

dueBefore.description: Return tasks due before this ISO 8601 date

maxResults.description: Maximum number of tasks to return (default: 100, max: 500)

name: updateTask
title: Update Task
description: Update an existing task/to-do: change title, due date, description, priority, completion status, or percent complete

calendarId.description: Calendar ID containing the task (from listTasks results)

dueDate.description: New due date in ISO 8601 format (optional)

completed.description: Set to true to mark the task done (sets percentComplete=100 and records completedDate), false to reopen it (optional)

name: searchContacts
title: Search Contacts
description: Search contacts across all address books by email address or name

query.description: Email address or name to search for

maxResults.description: Maximum number of results to return (default 50, max 200). If truncated, response includes hasMore: true.

name: createContact
title: Create Contact
description: Create a new contact in an address book

addressBookId.description: Address book directory ID (from searchContacts results). Defaults to the first writable address book.

name: updateContact
title: Update Contact
description: Update an existing contact's properties

name: deleteContact
title: Delete Contact
description: Delete a contact from its address book

name: replyToMessage
title: Reply to Message
description: Reply to a message. By default opens a compose window with quoted original text for review; set skipReview to send directly.

messageId.description: The message ID to reply to (from searchMessages results)

folderPath.description: The folder URI path (from searchMessages results)

isHtml.description: Set to true if body contains HTML markup (default: false)

from.description: Sender identity (email address or identity ID from listAccounts)

skipReview.description: If true, send the reply directly without opening a compose window (default: false)

attachments.description: Attachments: file paths (strings) or inline objects ({name, contentType, base64})

name: forwardMessage
title: Forward Message
description: Forward a message. By default opens a compose window with original content for review; set skipReview to send directly.

messageId.description: The message ID to forward (from searchMessages results)

folderPath.description: The folder URI path (from searchMessages results)

isHtml.description: Set to true if body contains HTML markup (default: false)

from.description: Sender identity (email address or identity ID from listAccounts)

skipReview.description: If true, send the forward directly without opening a compose window (default: false)

attachments.description: Additional attachments: file paths (strings) or inline objects ({name, contentType, base64})

name: getRecentMessages
title: Get Recent Messages
description: Get recent messages sorted newest-first from a specific folder or all Inboxes, with date and unread filtering

folderPath.description: Folder URI (from listFolders) to list messages from. If omitted, returns messages from all Inboxes.

daysBack.description: Only return messages from the last N days (default: 7). Use a larger value like 365 for older messages.

offset.description: Number of results to skip for pagination (default 0). When provided, returns {messages, totalMatches, offset, limit, hasMore} instead of a plain array. Note: totalMatches is capped at 10000.

includeSubfolders.description: If false, only return messages from the specified folder — not its subfolders. Default: true.

name: displayMessage
title: Display Message
description: Open or navigate to a message in the Thunderbird GUI. Use '3pane' (default) to select the message in the mail view, 'tab' to open in a new tab, or 'window' to open in a standalone window.

folderPath.description: The folder URI path (from searchMessages results)

displayMode.description: How to display: '3pane' (navigate in mail view, default), 'tab' (new tab), or 'window' (new window)

name: deleteMessages
title: Delete Messages
description: Delete messages from a folder. Drafts are moved to Trash instead of permanently deleted.

messageIds.description: Array of message IDs to delete

folderPath.description: The folder URI containing the messages (from listFolders or searchMessages results)

name: updateMessage
title: Update Message
description: Update one or more messages' read/flagged/tagged state and optionally move them. Supply messageId for a single message or messageIds for bulk operations. Tags are Thunderbird keywords (e.g. '$label1' for Important, '$label2' for Work, or any custom string). Note: combining tags with moveTo/trash on IMAP may not preserve tags on the moved copy — use separate calls if needed.

messageId.description: A single message ID (from searchMessages results). Required unless messageIds is provided.

messageIds.description: Array of message IDs for bulk operations. Required unless messageId is provided.

folderPath.description: The folder URI containing the message(s) (from searchMessages results)

read.description: Set to true/false to mark read/unread (optional)

addTags.description: Tag keywords to add (e.g. ['$label1', 'project-x']). Thunderbird built-in tags: $label1 (Important), $label2 (Work), $label3 (Personal), $label4 (To Do), $label5 (Later)

removeTags.description: Tag keywords to remove from the message(s)

moveTo.description: Destination folder URI (optional). Cannot be used with trash.

trash.description: Set to true to move message to Trash (optional). Cannot be used with moveTo.

name: createFolder
title: Create Folder
description: Create a new mail subfolder under an existing folder. Note: on IMAP accounts, server-side completion is asynchronous; verify with listFolders.

parentFolderPath.description: URI of the parent folder (from listFolders)

name: renameFolder
title: Rename Folder
description: Rename an existing mail folder. Note: on IMAP accounts, server-side completion is asynchronous; verify with listFolders.

folderPath.description: URI of the folder to rename (from listFolders)

name: deleteFolder
title: Delete Folder
description: Delete a mail folder and all its contents. Moves to Trash, or permanently deletes if already in Trash. Note: permanent deletion may prompt the user for confirmation. On IMAP accounts, server-side completion is asynchronous; verify with listFolders.

folderPath.description: URI of the folder to delete (from listFolders)

name: emptyTrash
title: Empty Trash
description: Permanently delete all messages in the Trash folder for an account.

accountId.description: Account ID (from listAccounts). If omitted, empties Trash for all accessible accounts.

name: emptyJunk
title: Empty Junk
description: Permanently delete all messages in the Junk/Spam folder for an account.

accountId.description: Account ID (from listAccounts). If omitted, empties Junk for all accessible accounts.

name: moveFolder
title: Move Folder
description: Move a mail folder to a new parent folder within the same account. Note: on IMAP accounts, server-side completion is asynchronous; verify with listFolders.

folderPath.description: URI of the folder to move (from listFolders)

newParentPath.description: URI of the destination parent folder (from listFolders)

name: listFilters
title: List Filters
description: List all mail filters/rules for an account with their conditions and actions

accountId.description: Account ID from listAccounts (omit for all accounts)

name: createFilter
title: Create Filter
description: Create a new mail filter rule on an account

attrib.description: Attribute: subject, from, to, cc, toOrCc, body, date, priority, status, size, ageInDays, hasAttachment, junkStatus, tag, otherHeader

op.description: Operator: contains, doesntContain, is, isnt, isEmpty, beginsWith, endsWith, isGreaterThan, isLessThan, isBefore, isAfter, matches, doesntMatch

header.description: Custom header name (only when attrib is otherHeader)

type.description: Action: moveToFolder, copyToFolder, markRead, markUnread, markFlagged, addTag, changePriority, delete, stopExecution, forward, reply

value.description: Action parameter (folder URI for move/copy, tag name for addTag, priority for changePriority, email for forward)

insertAtIndex.description: Position to insert (0 = top priority, default: end of list)

name: updateFilter
title: Update Filter
description: Modify an existing filter's properties, conditions, or actions

conditions.description: Replace all conditions (optional, same format as createFilter)

attrib.description: Attribute: subject, from, to, cc, toOrCc, body, date, priority, status, size, ageInDays, hasAttachment, junkStatus, tag, otherHeader

op.description: Operator: contains, doesntContain, is, isnt, isEmpty, beginsWith, endsWith, isGreaterThan, isLessThan, isBefore, isAfter, matches, doesntMatch

header.description: Custom header name (only when attrib is otherHeader)

actions.description: Replace all actions (optional, same format as createFilter)

type.description: Action: moveToFolder, copyToFolder, markRead, markUnread, markFlagged, addTag, changePriority, delete, stopExecution, forward, reply

value.description: Action parameter (folder URI for move/copy, tag name for addTag, priority for changePriority, email for forward)

name: deleteFilter
title: Delete Filter
description: Delete a mail filter by index

name: reorderFilters
title: Reorder Filters
description: Move a filter to a different position in the execution order

name: applyFilters
title: Apply Filters
description: Manually run all enabled filters on a folder to organize existing messages

folderPath.description: Folder URI to apply filters to (from listFolders)

name: getAccountAccess
title: Get Account Access
description: Get the current account access control list. Shows which accounts the agent server can access. Account access is configured by the user in the extension settings page (Tools > Add-ons > Thunderbird Agent > Options) and cannot be changed from external agent calls.
